title: Softmax-recip dual-stream physical feasibility for Llama7B attention
hypothesis: The softmax-recip subtile pipeline schedule selects dual_mac for latency, but the architecture frontier should only use that point if duplicated QK/V compute fits the measured 45nm logic budget; otherwise the physically valid frontier is the best area-fitting split/shared-MAC schedule.

direct_comparison.primary_question: Does the softmax-recip dual_mac subtile pipeline fit the measured logic budget, or must the current frontier fall back to split/shared MAC?
include: Apply measured full-value attention tile and softmax reciprocal LUT generator PPA to the schedule rows.
Treat compute_area_multiplier=2.0 for dual_mac as requiring duplicated compute resources.
Report best requested mode, best area-fitting mode, logic slack, compute area over budget, required density gain, and recommended next action.
exclude: Do not substitute a denser int8 compute block in this exact-q8/kv8/v16 feasibility check.
Do not change HBM, SRAM, NoC, precision, or KV sharing assumptions.
Do not promote dual_mac unless its required compute area fits the measured logic budget.
follow_on_broad_sweep: If dual_mac is area-blocked, evaluate denser fused/partitioned attention compute or measured int8 compute substitution before promoting the 1575 us point.
If split_mac is the best feasible point, use it as the current physically valid frontier for whole-model ranking.
Validate online correction precision before promoting any subtile schedule as final.

expected_benefit: Prevents the schedule-only dual_mac latency from being treated as physically free.
Identifies the current physically valid latency under measured 45nm compute area.
Quantifies the compute density gap needed to recover the optimistic dual_mac point.
risks: The feasibility model still uses measured block substitution rather than a full composed dual-stream RTL PPA run.
The result does not resolve online-correction numerical quality.
A denser compute datapath may change timing, power, and routing in ways not captured by this analytic feasibility check.

expected_result.reason: The result should decide whether the softmax-recip dual_mac subtile pipeline fits the measured logic budget and identify the current best physically feasible schedule.
